title: Nero's Crafting Amnesiac
description: A personal modpack focused on creating a truly enhanced experience without annoying and intrusive mods that break immersion.
body:
This modpack aims to feature mods simple that do not change the base vanilla experience and yet introduce new structures, update old ones, new biomes and better world generation. With a little quality of life features either for your own advantage or multiplayer utility. 

For players that want a new experience without compromising vanilla gameplay integrity.
